headline: Blurred Vision? See an Eye Specialist in Chennai
subheadline: Blurred vision can have many causes -- from a simple prescription change to early cataracts or retina conditions. AIIMS-trained Dr. Rajeswari will identify the real cause.
metaDescription: Experiencing blurred vision? See AIIMS-trained Dr. Rajeswari in KK Nagar, Chennai for a thorough evaluation. Call or book online.
symptoms: Gradual blurring that's worsened over weeks or months
Sudden blurred vision in one or both eyes
Difficulty seeing clearly at distance or up close
Blurred vision along with glare or halos at night

processSteps.title: Vision & Refraction Test
processSteps.description: Checking whether a simple glasses prescription is the cause.

processSteps.title: Eye Health Examination
processSteps.description: Ruling out cataracts, retina conditions, or other underlying issues.

processSteps.title: Clear Next Steps
processSteps.description: Whether it's glasses, treatment, or reassurance -- you'll know exactly what's going on.
